location: Deathtouched Catacombs — pull the lever near the entrance to open a hidden door; the katana hangs from a corpse behind it. No boss fight required for this item (the catacombs' boss, Black Knife Assassin, guards a separate reward further in).
tactics: Head to Stormhill, west of Saintsbridge, to find the catacombs entrance
Pull the lever just past the entrance to open the hidden door — the Uchigatana is on a corpse behind it
You can leave immediately with the weapon; the optional boss (Black Knife Assassin, starts at reduced HP) is deeper in and guards a talisman, not the katana
lore: A curved blade of the katana style, favored for a heavy attack that draws blood. One of the most commonly recommended early/mid-game weapons for its low stat requirements and innate Bleed passive.

builds.name: Quality Katana
builds.why: Even STR/DEX split via the Quality affinity — this repo's own "Quality" preset uses it at +25

builds.name: Bleed Katana
builds.why: Blood affinity + high ARC stacks the innate Bloodloss passive on top of scaling bleed buildup
